title: Embodied AI Project Dashboard
subtitle: World models, self-improving simulators, teleop acceleration, and robotics + 3D printing

summary.focus: Frame the whole portfolio as one loop: real-robot infra collects and validates data; UMI / layered / HOI projects structure it; simulator and PoD projects turn it into robot tasks, evaluation, and physical outputs.
summary.progress: ARX infra was completed; ready hardware baseline is recorded; Franka dual-arm same-computer control and Gello-driven Franka + Wuji Hand trigger control are working; UMI annotation panel and Gemini frame test are done; UMI base-model / codebase tests, Self-Improving Agents, and Robotics + 3D Printing remain active.
summary.blockers: Cross-device sync, calibration, and data schema; MANUS glove + VIVE Tracker retargeting; Gello passive-master gravity-compensation risk; real-robot cable management / emergency-stop coverage / waterproofing; UMI base-model route and evaluation set; LeHome / RoboLab unification; CAD-to-printer plus robot takeout / assembly handoff; scope boundaries for survey tracks.
summary.next: Continue the Franka + Wuji Hand path by testing MANUS glove + VIVE Tracker, harden the real-robot safety workspace, ask Yuhang to compare mechanical master-arm gravity compensation / damping / brake against FACTR-style force-feedback teleoperation, prepare the UMI test set for Haoyu, run TI2V / AI2V inference, fold WEM-style world/ego decomposition into the layered-WM notes, define the simulator task / asset interface, and scope the PoD prototype.

storyline.summary: How real-robot infra, human demonstrations, video world models, simulators, and physical outputs form one loop.

nodes.title: Real-Robot Data Infra
nodes.body: ARX, UMI, Cobot Magic, Linker hands, gloves, VIVE Tracker, and Franka + Wuji provide the hardware base for collection, calibration, and validation.

nodes.title: Video + HOI World Modeling
nodes.body: UMI wrist views, layered third-person videos, same-task HOI data, and rate-curve teleop research turn human operation into structured video, action, and state data.

nodes.title: Self-Improving Sim + Physical Products
nodes.body: Generated assets, household tasks, simulator rollouts, robot evaluation, and language / image-to-CAD design close the loop back into real-world experiments.

flows.title: How generated videos become robot data, not only visual prediction

nodes.title: UMI Data via Teleop Video Model
nodes.body: Wrist-view UMI data can be generated directly from teleoperation trajectories: action, gripper state, and dual eye-in-hand views condition the video world model.

nodes.title: Layered Video World Model
nodes.body: Third-person videos are split into persistent scene, object/contact, and robot/ego dynamics, making them easier to use for scene understanding, IDM, reward models, and data augmentation.

nodes.title: Agentic R2S2R to Dual-Simulator Data
nodes.body: Large volumes of generated video data become dual-simulator Robot Data through object physics assets, panoramic scene reconstruction, and digital-twin robot rollouts.

visual_references.caption: Real-robot infra: ARX, Franka + Wuji Hand, UMI, Linker Hand, gloves, and VIVE Tracker.
EgoVTLA pillars: perception alignment and intuition alignment.
World-model-driven EgoVTLA: vision -> depth / flow -> action.
Layered world model: persistent scene, object/contact, and robot/ego dynamics.
PEARL-style loop: memory, attribution, co-evolution, governance.

visual_references.alt: Robotics and 3D printing product design platform
visual_references.caption: Robotics + 3D printing: generated structure exported toward printable parts, printer-farm takeout, and assembly.

visual_references.alt: Drag-teaching robot data video editing and hand removal
visual_references.caption: Drag-demo editing: ARX egg-cracking data, Kling hand removal, and diff-map QA.

visual_references.alt: HOI diverse dataset with ego camera, hand pose, and depth
visual_references.caption: Diverse same-task HOI data: ego RGB, hand pose, and z16 depth.

rules: dashboard/index.html is a rendered shell; dashboard/state/*.json is the source of truth for project and task content.
Dashboard updates stay limited to project summaries, risks, decisions, and task/TODO state.
Runtime control-plane state belongs outside this repository.
